concept: Midnight / Middle of Night / Deepest Dark
description: The middle of the night; twelve o'clock at night. 'Phoemu' names the night's depth—the hinge between one day and the next, the hour of deepest quiet.
sound_symbolism: The word rests in deep dark. 'Pho' /ɸo/ begins with quiet breath, stillness present. The vowel 'e' opens to the void. Then 'mu' grounds in darkness, midnight held.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'mua phoemu' (at midnight). The center point of night, when the world is most still and the boundary between days is crossed.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Midnight stillness offers profound quiet—the hour when even the restless mind can find peace.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Midnight marked the deep—the hour when spirits were said to move, when the veil was thin.
